reviews.review_description: I play the game when it was new but now you can’t join codes or be in a server fun monkey horror is a great game I just wish you could join a public server or be with your friends
This game is goated and it’s so fun but they need to bring place back but crawlspace is amazing
Veri shigma skibi toet I totly noy staf cuz I spel lke 6 yer Od
Worst game ever played can't join a code

Get this game now if you havent it has active players and it is a mix of og fun monke horror mixed with smh and it has the perfect mix of horror and fun. The best part is definitely the backrooms because there are so many levels that have fun puzzles to solve

reviews.review_title: I finally found a good Gtag horror
reviews.review_description: Perfect and is amazing I’m now really happy again I hope this game dosent get reported or anything bad because this is my favourite game ever!

I'll be updating this with every update.
-------------
Idea 1: Add weapons so if we can't run we can at least fight back. (Guns 🇺🇸)
Idea 2:  Add more stalkers to city 😎👍
Idea 3: Add a enity call "Larry Chan'
-------------
(Update 15V)
Bug fixes:
Bug 1: It doesn't show the current players it just says 0. (Servers are full - Goofy / Onwer)
Bug 2: the glowing cosmetics doesn't show a price to buy them. (Fixxed)
(Update 16V)
Bug 1: You can't buy cosmetics currently or wear them at mirror.
Bug 2: Other players can see your stalker (idk if it's supposed to be like that.)
Bug 3: Random Fps drops
Bug 4: Entities in forest can bounce off of each other making them somewhat fly.
Bug 5(8:10PM est): The new green enity from forest got into city somehow in a pub lobby and was in the walls murdering players.
